risk_patterns.business_impact: Unlimited financial exposure - company could face bankruptcy from a single claim
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Potential unlimited damages awarded by court
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Add liability cap limiting to fees paid in preceding 12 months or a fixed monetary amount
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Liability shall not exceed fees paid in previous 12 months or Rs. 10,00,000, whichever is lower.

risk_patterns.business_impact: Interest at three times bank rate + compound interest with monthly rests - up to 30%+ effective rate
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Statutory liability irrespective of contract terms - no waiver possible
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Change payment terms to 30 days or less from date of acceptance/invoice
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Payment shall be made within 30 days of receipt of correct invoice.

risk_patterns.business_impact: Penalties up to Rs. 250 Crore under DPDP Act, reputational damage
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Regulatory action, class action lawsuits from affected individuals
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Add comprehensive data protection clause with breach notification, security measures, and data processing restrictions
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Both parties shall comply with applicable data protection laws. Processor shall implement security measures...

risk_patterns.business_impact: Disallowance of expense (30% not deductible), interest at 1% per month, penalty equal to tax amount
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Prosecution with imprisonment up to 7 years, deemed assessee in default
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Add clause requiring TDS deduction as per applicable rates and issuance of TDS certificate
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Customer shall deduct tax at source as required under Income Tax Act, 1961. Vendor shall provide PAN and TDS certificate.

risk_patterns.business_impact: Higher legal costs (Rs. 10-50 lakhs for foreign litigation), difficulty enforcing rights
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Need to hire foreign counsel, risk of unfamiliar legal principles
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Change governing law to India, preferably with arbitration in Indian city
risk_patterns.sample_clause: This Agreement shall be governed by laws of India. Any dispute shall be resolved by arbitration in New Delhi.

risk_patterns.business_impact: Potential liability far exceeding contract value
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Cap indemnity obligation at fees paid or fixed amount, limit to third party claims, add procedural requirements
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Indemnity obligation is limited to direct damages and capped at fees paid in preceding 12 months.

risk_patterns.business_impact: No recourse if software/services are defective
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Cannot claim damages for defective products/services
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Add limited warranty for a reasonable period (30-90 days) that software conforms to documentation
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Vendor warrants that for 90 days from delivery, the Services will conform to the specifications in all material respects.

risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Change to explicit renewal with 60+ days notice, or remove auto-renewal
risk_patterns.sample_clause: This Agreement may be renewed by mutual written agreement at least 60 days before expiry.

risk_patterns.business_impact: Cannot verify vendor compliance with SLAs, data protection, or billing accuracy
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Add annual audit right at customer's expense, with more frequent audits if issues found
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Customer may audit Vendor's compliance annually upon 30 days notice.

risk_patterns.pattern_name: No Liability for Consequential Damages Exception
risk_patterns.business_impact: Cannot recover for business interruption, lost revenue, data loss
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Typical but important to understand - ensure exceptions for IP infringement, breach of confidentiality
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Add exceptions for breach of confidentiality, IP infringement, and non-payment
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Consequential damages exclusion shall not apply to claims arising from breach of confidentiality, IP infringement, or non-payment.

risk_patterns.business_impact: Cannot assign to affiliate or acquirer without permission
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Contract may not transfer in M&A transaction
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Add exception for assignment to affiliates or in acquisition without consent
risk_patterns.sample_clause: Either party may assign to an affiliate or successor in merger without consent, with written notice.

risk_patterns.pattern_name: No IP Ownership for Custom Work
risk_patterns.business_impact: Vendor may own custom-developed IP, license can be terminated, vendor could sell to competitors
risk_patterns.legal_impact: Disputes over IP ownership, litigation risks
risk_patterns.recommended_fix: Add clause assigning all deliverables and IP created for Customer to Customer
risk_patterns.sample_clause: All deliverables created specifically for Customer shall be works made for hire owned by Customer. Vendor assigns all rights therein.
